# Green Herbalz

> 100% Homemade Botanical Skincare — Handcrafted in Tamil Nadu, India

## About

Green Herbalz is a small-batch, homemade skincare brand based in Koradacheri, Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu. Every product is handcrafted at home using pure, natural botanical ingredients — no factories, no mass production. Founded with a philosophy of conscious sourcing and modern botanical chemistry, Green Herbalz bridges ancient herbal wisdom with contemporary skincare science.

## Products

### Herbal Henna Cone
- Price: ₹30 per cone (minimum order: 8 pieces)
- Description: Premium herbal formula henna cone made with natural botanical ingredients. Provides rich, natural color with smooth application.

### Botanical Lip Balm
- Price: ₹30 per unit (minimum order: 8 pieces)
- Description: Natural extract lip balm with customizable ingredients. Keeps lips moisturized all day with pure botanical formulation.

### Herbal Lipstick
- Price: ₹110 per unit (minimum order: 4 pieces)
- Description: Traditional remedy herbal infusion lipstick. Handcrafted with natural herbs for safe, chemical-free color.

### Artisan Herbal Soap
- Price: ₹60 per bar (minimum order: 4 pieces)
- Description: Handcrafted botanical cleansing bar available in multiple variants including Red Wine, Charcoal, and Milk. Customizable with your choice of ingredients, shape, and weight.

### Rosemary Oil
- Price: ₹160 per bottle (minimum order: 4 pieces)
- Description: Pure herbal rosemary extract oil for hair and skin care. Cold-pressed and naturally formulated.

## Key Facts

- Location: Koradacheri, Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu 610106, India
- Phone: +91 99427 38921
- Hours: Mon–Sat 9AM–6PM, Sun by appointment
- Instagram: @_green.herbalz_
- YouTube: @greenherbalz
- Website: https://greenherbalz.vercel.app
- Shipping: Pan-India delivery available; free local pickup in Thiruvarur
- Certifications: 100% Natural, Cruelty-Free, Handcrafted, Sustainable
- Price Range: ₹30–₹160
- Shelf Life: 3–6 months (preservative-free, made fresh)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Are all your products really homemade?
Yes, 100%! Every single product is handcrafted at home in small batches. We never use factory production. Each item is made with personal care using pure, natural botanical ingredients sourced locally.

### Are these products safe for sensitive skin?
Absolutely. Our products are made with natural herbs and botanicals without harsh chemicals, parabens, or synthetic fragrances. However, if you have specific allergies, please message us on Instagram and we'll guide you to the right product.

### How do I place an order?
Simply click the "Contact & Buy via Instagram" button on any product. Your order details will be copied to your clipboard — just paste it in our Instagram DM and hit send. We'll confirm your order and arrange delivery!

### Do you deliver across India?
Yes, we deliver pan-India! Shipping charges may vary based on your location. For local orders in Thiruvarur, we also offer free pickup. Contact us on Instagram for delivery details and timelines.

### Can I customize the soaps with my own ingredients?
Yes! Use our Soap Customizer to choose your preferred shape, weight, and main ingredient. You can even type in your own custom ingredient. Once you're happy, hit "Apply & Order" and it'll send your custom order to our Instagram.

### What is the shelf life of your products?
Since our products are 100% natural and preservative-free, they have a shelf life of 3-6 months depending on the product. We always make fresh batches so you receive the freshest product possible. Store in a cool, dry place for best results.
